creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=798258e75c736afe0487cbfeb227c3c56f373453

commit 798258e75c736afe0487cbfeb227c3c56f373453
Author:     Tatsuki Makino <tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com>
AuthorDate: 2023-04-10 12:00:00 +0000
Commit:     Robert Clausecker <fuz@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2023-04-28 16:13:41 +0000

    print/epson-inkjet-printer-escpr: Update to 1.7.26

    New PPD files for the following models have been added.
    EP-315 series
    PX-S155 series
    PX-S505 series
    WF-2110 series
    XP-65 series
    WF-M1130 series

    No file changes for autoconf, so fixed to use 2.69.
    pkg-descr was re-quoted from the description for other packages, not from the README.

    PR:             270169

 print/epson-inkjet-printer-escpr/Makefile                |  6 +++---
 print/epson-inkjet-printer-escpr/distinfo                |  6 +++---
 .../files/patch-ppd_Makefile.am                          |  4 ++--
 print/epson-inkjet-printer-escpr/pkg-descr               | 16 ++++++++--------
 print/epson-inkjet-printer-escpr/pkg-plist               |  6 ++++++
 5 files changed, 22 insertions(+), 16 deletions(-)
